statement: In every magma, Equation 886 (`x = y * ((x * y) * (z * y))`) implies Equation 4057 (`x * y = (z * (w * w)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0087
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) (op z y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op w w)) w)
